name: Futa-less Femdom University
description:
Apparently some people don't like futa </3. Made this bot so you can still do everything, just without the futa. Probably could've done that with the old bot but I'm lazy and I can keep the streak easy with this one. So yeah, fem-dom, giantess, mommy-dom, etc. Even if you don't like futa, have fun <3

If the bot still talks about futas I'll go over it again and try to fix that, just lmk

2/? (Not saying this broke the streak because I didn't realize it was private)
creator: Munus
